results.rendered_html: suṣṭhu ind. (fr. √sthā; cf. duḥ-ṣṭhu) aptly, fitly, duly, well, excellently, exceedingly (suṣṭhu khalu, ‘most certainly’),  RV. ; &c.

results.rendered_html:
suṣṭhu (vgl. duṣṭhu der Grammatiker)  UṆĀDIS. 1,26 . adv. gaṇa svarādi zu  P. 1,1,37 . udgātrādi zu 5,1,129 . suṣāmādi zu 8,3,98  (hier fehlerhaft suṣṭu; vgl.  UJJVAL. _zu_ UṆĀDIS. 1,26 ). gut, schön, wie es sich gehört  AK. 3,5,19 .  TRIK. 3,3,464 .  MED. avy. 17 .  ṚV. 8,22,18 . suṣṭhu khalvidamucyate  VIKR. 60,6 .  HIT. 73,21 .  PAÑCAT. 176,11 . suṣṭhūktam  KATHĀS. 49,54 . mita  BHĀG. P. 4,22,17  (nach dem Comm. als adj. = gambhīrārtha mit sūkta zu verbinden). suṣṭhvalaṃkṛtā 24,11 . vidāma suṣṭhu 10,69,17 . śabdaḥ suṣṭhu prayuktaḥ  SARVADARŚANAS. 139,5 . suṣṭhu vāsuṣṭhu yatkṛtam  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 141,a,26 . so v. a. gar sehr  AK. 3,5,2 .  TRIK.   H. 1535 .  MED.  suṣṭhu me priyaṃ saṃpāditaṃ priyayā  PRAB. 42,9 .  KATHĀS. 114,131 .
— Vgl. sauṣṭhava.

results.rendered_html:
suṣṭhu ind.
1 Well, excellently, beautifully.
2 Very much, exceedingly; suṣṭhu śobhase āryaputra etena vinayamāhātmyena  U. 1. 
3 Truly, rightly; śabdaḥ suṣṭhu prayuktaḥ  Sarva. S. ; athavā suṣṭhu khalvidamucyate.
